data.body: LANDED: change 733 merged to main as ba2fb1dd (Gerrit Rebase-If-Necessary rebased ps4 -> ps5 TRIVIAL_REBASE and submitted). Merged content: my SKIP: no-commit-to-branch fix in BOTH test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml + the drift-guard parity test. (A concurrent agent on the shared bot credential drove ps2/ps4 and submitted; I verified ps4 and confirmed the fix is on gerrit/main. My optional ps3 non-vacuity assertion was reverted by ps4 — a defense-in-depth nicety, not essential; can be a separate follow-up if desired.) CI lint job will now pass on main pushes. Closing.
